name: The Parcade
about: The Parcade is a golf simulator facility located in Chillicothe, Missouri. It operates as members-only but welcomes the public for tee times, featuring state-of-the-art Uneekor-powered Swing Suite simulators with access to over 400+ courses, including iconic PGA Tour venues. The facility offers flexible booking options, including hourly rentals, punch cards, and memberships, and also sells custom used golf carts. It is open 365 days a year, with extended hours for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 400+ courses, including major PGA Tour venues like TPC courses, Pinehurst, and Augusta National
365-day operation with flexible hours (7am-11pm for members, public hours vary)
Option to purchase custom used golf carts, extending the experience beyond the simulators

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of alcohol service or BYOB policy.
